installCommand: echo 'Flutter is downloaded during the build step.'
buildCommand: git clone --depth 1 --branch stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git .flutter-sdk && ./.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter pub get && ./.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
